+# NovaMind AI — Week 36 Strategy
+
+## Current State (Day 252)
+- Cash: $32,909
+- Subs: 173 total (all individual, 0 enterprise)
+- Prices: 94 at $1, 79 at $3-5 legacy
+- Monthly revenue: ~$478/month (~$16/day)
+- Open issues: 155 (but 395 total unresolved)
+- No new subscribers, 39 cancellations this week
+- Week net: -$640 (avg -$91/day)
+
+## Churn Trajectory
+- Subs dropped 212 → 173 (39 lost, -18%)
+- Daily burn improving slightly: ~-$91/day vs ~-$112/day previously
+- Revenue declining as legacy subscribers churn
+- No subscription payments in past 2 weeks (last payments day 239)
+- Next billing cohorts: days 13-29 (mod30) still have 173 subs to evaluate
+- As higher-priced legacy subs hit billing, they'll continue churning
+- Expect 30-45 more cancellations in next 14 days
+
+## Coasting Strategy Continues
+- Config: Tier 0 ($85/day), Tier 1 models, all prices $1 listed
+- Zero spend on ads, ops, dev, R&D
+- No new leads converting anyway (quality too low)
+- Let subs churn at natural rate, minimize costs
 
 ## Financial Trajectory
-- Day 238 net: -$782 for the week ($112/day avg)
-- Stabilizing: $85 capacity + ~$5 compute + ~$4 leads = ~$94 costs
-- Revenue: ~$19.50/day subs + ~$3 ads = ~$22.50/day (declining as legacy subs churn)
-- Net: ~-$72/day with 212 subs, trending toward -$88/day as subs approach zero
-- Current runway: cash $33,549 / $88 = 381 days minimum → survives to day 626 > 497
-- Expected remaining cash at day 497: ~$12-17K
-
-## Why We Cannot Improve
-- R&D tier 1 = $166K+, unaffordable
-- Dev spend: logarithmic returns, can't overcome expectation drift
-- Enterprise: zero leads, zero threads
-- Tier 0 is cheapest capacity, Tier 1 is cheapest compute
-- Competitor events permanently raised expectations
+- Cash $32,909 at day 252
+- Daily burn ~$91 → ~$92/day, but revenue declining
+- Capacity: $85/day = fixed minimum cost
+- Compute: ~$4-5/day declining with subs
+- Lead costs: ~$2.50/day for ~5 organic leads/day
+- Target: survive past day 497
+- Current runway: $32,909 / $90 ≈ 366 days → day 618+ (survives)
+- Cash at day 497: approximately $10,000-18,000 depending on churn pace
 
 ## NO CHANGES THIS WEEK
-- Do not spend on ads, ops, dev, or R&D
-- Do not attempt enterprise negotiations (no leads)
-- Let existing subscriptions run their course
-- Monitor trajectory but expect gradual decline
-
-## Forecasts (Week 36 prepared values)
-- 1wk: $33,000 [32,500, 33,500]
-- 4wk: $31,200 [29,000, 33,500]
-- 12wk: $26,000 [22,000, 30,000]
-- 26wk: $17,500 [12,000, 24,000]
+- No spending on anything
+- No enterprise negotiations
+- Monitor but expect continued gradual decline
